assertions.description: 16 total components: 5 connectors, 3 switches (SW1 SPDT, SW2 SPDT, SW3 DIP3), 4 resistors (including 3 potentiometers classified as resistor which is acceptable), 1 IC (LM3914N), 1 diode (1N5711), 1 capacitor, 1 LED display (BAR1=HDSP-4836 classified as led). Power rails +9V and GND correctly identified.
D0 (1N5711 diode) and J0 (2-pin connector) use non-standard zero-indexed references. The analyzer correctly identifies these in annotation_issues.zero_indexed_refs.
